26 November 2024
FEDERAL GOVERNMENT
GAZETTE
COMPANIES (AMENDMENT) REGULATIONS 2024 |
of the Companies Act 2016 [Act 777], the Minister makes the following regulations:
1. (1) These regulations may be cited as the Companies (Amendment)
(2) These Regulations come into operation on 30 November 2024.

2. The Companies Regulations 2017 [P.U. (A) 37/2017] are amended in the Schedule
by inserting after item 40 and the particulars relating to it the following item and
particulars:
(1) (2) (3)

"40A. Publication or advertisement on the website 500.00".
of the Commission under section 612A
[KPDNKK.100-1/4/25; PN(PU2)740/JLD.4]
DATUK ARMIZAN BIN MOHD ALI
